transcript.text:
What's this?
A pledge to the grill?
We pledge to grill the chicken properly over charcoal for the juiciness
Kkubeurakko!
[Who's this?]
[This ad is mine...]
[This is mukbang]
Kkubeurak-Ko
[Cluck cluck]
The sponsor will love it
-Where do you work at? -Goobne Chicken (different brand)
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some chicken today
This charcoal-grilled chicken restaurant has been trending lately
And I really love fire-grilled chicken
Right over here

[Kkubeurakko Chicken]
What's this? A pledge to the grill?
Hello
[Welcome!]
I thought they only had grilled-chicken
But they also have fried chicken
Excuse me
Hello
Which one is the most popular?
Our customers love our Charcoal Seasoned Grill
There's a combo set of any 2 chickens from the menu
Charcoal Teriyaki, Charcoal Grill, Fried, and Spicy
Those 4 chickens and also,
Tteokboki, Fried Sampler, and Udon noodles, please
We'll prepare those for you
What does Kkubeurakko mean?

In Busan (southern dialect), "Gowuh" (grill it) is expressed as "Kkubeura"
So like "go grill it"
"kko" means chicken
Oh I see
Kkubeurakko!
[A pledge...]
Kkubeurakko pledge to grill the chicken properly over charcoal for the juiciness, for our proud people
[Spicy seasoned chicken]
[Fried chicken]
[Charcoal grilled chicken]
[Charcoal teriyaki]
[Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)]
[Udon noodles]
[All set]
[Bring 'em in!]
This is our new dish

It's garaetteok (stick rice cake)
[Setting up]
[Photo time]
Where do I start?
Their most popular dish
A lot of meat
It's like 3 times bigger than normal pieces It's a lot of food
I approve
So moist and tender
I thought it would be a little dry because of the charcoal grill
So moist and soft
The seasoning is not too spicy
A seasoning that kids can enjoy too
Smokey flavors
Let's try the teriyaki
This is all leg meat (dark meat)

It's yummy
Sauce is tasty too
You can't forget about the rice cake in here
The meat is so soft
I feel like the kids would really enjoy these types of chicken
The teriyaki sauce is delicious
Drumstick over here
So savory
How about with a little bit of salt?
Juicy meat with thin and crispy skin
The juiciness that bursts from the thin crispiness
Although we are known for our grilled chicken,
Many have said that our fried chicken is way better than the restaurant that specialize in them
Thank you
As for our tteokboki,
This is pojangmacha tteokboki (tent-styled street bar)

Multteok is common in Busan
I really love that
This is something I enjoy a lot
This is from Busan
Delicious
Their tteokboki should be their main
Too good to be a side
[Very nice]
Calamari
Tasty!
Haven't had the spicy seasoned yet
A lot of food for 1 chicken
Usually doesn't pile up this much
[Proud moments]
I had no idea
[How can we not watch this legendary mukbang]

Chicken skin over here
It's really crunchy
That crunchy texture
This should be on the menu too
I feel like you can dip this in any sauces here
This one too
That's good
This one
It's real!
Thank you
[I love you]
[Me too]
[She sent me a heart!]
I'm a real fan! Been subscribed for 2 years!
Thank you
It's really hot outside

Should I give them some?
[Come in]
-Hello -Hello
[90 degree fold]
Are you really Tzuyang?
Yes (as you can see...]
-Can we take a photo? -Of course
-A selfie?! -Of course
[Proud moment]
Would you like some chicken?
Thank you!
-Did you just finish school? -I had a test today
You're so pretty
You're gorgeous
Legendary
Here, have some

I will try this one
Is it good?
It's very tasty
Our sponsor would be proud
Kkubeura-kko
How was the test?
[Crickets...]
[I see...]
A message to your mom
Sorry mom
-Where do you work? -Goobne Chicken (different brand)
[Sorry boss]
She eats really well
I really really enjoy watching you I will really really always click 'Like'
I will really really comment everyday
Really really really really thank you

[Really really time to go home]
[For you]
Kkubeurakko will give 1 chicken each to these student subscribers
[We know tests can be stressful]
This should be good with tteokboki sauce too
Chicken and tteokboki has been trending
Some sauce on this too
Spicy seasoned
Into the red sauce over here
It'll be great
The meat is chewy
So good
They re-heated this for me
Their portions are huge
In quantities of the pieces And also the size of them
They're this big and there are this many in 1 chicken? Really worth the money

With some tteokboki sauce
That's good
Chicken always goes well with the sides
It's hot
I keep going back to this grilled chicken
The rice cake that are in here are so delicious
Better than other tteokboki rice cakes
Should I start serving it like this too?
Calamari
Dip the fried chicken in here
I haven't had the fishcake yet
Green chili pepper inside
A bite of the boiled egg
Udon noodles I forgot about these
This comes out seasoned and stir-fried
I love that this restaurant has a lot of sides

You can choose the right sides to go with your choice of chicken
This is also re-heated
Still hot
I thought the sauce would be similar
This is very tasty
It's like buldak sauce (fire chicken), but it's not spicy
How about with chicken?
It's yummy
The first thing that came to mind when I had this Was that it would go well with rice
Excuse me
-Do you have chicken and rice here? -Yes we do
It will be really good
Should I bring some?
You have the same expressions
Like a robot
[Kkubeurakko's AI Bot...]

Some rice and dried seaweed flakes for you
It will be very delicious with the seasoned chicken
Looks delicious!
Bon appetit
This is very cost-efficient
This sauce goes so well with rice
This sauce is made to be mixed with rice
Thought you would need this
Thank you
Sesame oil
I thought no one heard
It would be good with sesame oil
I put too much
It's even better
I can't just pick 1 when it comes to udon and rice
Yum

Fried chicken
Still crispy
Let's finish it up
Still a drumstick left
I save the best for last
But I eat drumsticks first Before someone else takes it
Tasty
-How did you like the food? -It was very good
I have some good news for you
We just came out with a Kkubeurakko ordering app
[Amazing...]
That's great news
Any benefits of using the app?
We are thinking of discounts and promotions for app orders
The details will be posted in the comments
Thank you

[Mission Accomplished]
It has a kick to it Not too spicy
It's numbing my tongue
[Finished]
I was shocked to see her eat this much in person
Everything was delicious They were so juicy
I had a great meal
Thank you!
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
